channel.title: Wisconsin Sports (Core Teams)
channel.description: Packers, Bucks, Brewers scores + UW Badgers scores & news.

item.title: MLB • Live: San Francisco Giants 2 @ Milwaukee Brewers 6 (Bot 2nd)
item.description: San Francisco Giants vs Milwaukee Brewers — Bot 2nd

item.description: Milwaukee Brewers vs Houston Astros — Final

item.description: Milwaukee Brewers vs Houston Astros — Final

item.title: Brewers News: Brewers shift Priester's rehab to Arizona after struggles in Triple-A
Brewers News: Uribe gets out of bases-loaded jam in 9th after appealing suspension
Brewers News: Brewers, Astros both excited by UW-Milwaukee's NCAA tourney upset win
Brewers News: This top prospect is picking up right where he left off after missing a month of action
Brewers News: Uecker's newest tribute is fittingly larger than life
Brewers News: Does the NL have the most loaded Cy Young field of all time?
UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Announces Big Ten Schedule
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Wisconsin volleyball and head coach Kelly Sheffield officially announce the Badgers 2026 Big Ten slate.

item.title: UW News • Football: Kickoff times and TV info released for select Badger games
item.description: Wisconsin will take on Minnesota on Black Friday in primetime

item.title: UW News • Football: City of Green Bay and Wisconsin Athletics reveal details for Badger Bash North
item.description: Downtown Green Bay will host slate of fan events on Saturday, Sept. 5 ahead of Wisconsin's season opener at Lambeau Field on Sept. 6

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin announces exciting Big Ten home opponents for 2026-27
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Big Ten opponents for Wisconsin men's basketball have been announced for next season and the home slate features an exciting lineup.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin to take on Auburn in Nashville
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — The Wisconsin men's basketball team will head to the Music City next December as the Badgers are slated to take on Auburn in Nashville, Tennessee on Saturday, Dec. 19, the two programs announced on Tuesday.

item.title: UW News • Football: Kickoff time for season opener revealed
item.description: The 2026 season will kick off at 6:30 p.m. CT on Sunday, Sept. 6 against Notre Dame

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers Set to Serve Up a Storm This Season
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – Head coach Kelly Sheffield of the Wisconsin volleyball team and the Big Ten Conference announces it's complete 2026 schedule of opponents. The schedule is highlighted by 11 teams that finished in the Top 25 final rankings in 2025, and the inaugural Big Ten Tournament that will be held at Fishers Event Center in Fishers, Indiana.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: 2026 Volleyball Season Tickets on Sale Now
item.description: Madison, Wis. – 2026 Wisconsin volleyball season tickets are available for order today! Don't miss out on your opportunity to keep the UW Field House tradition alive.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin adds Julia Ford to women’s basketball staff
item.description: Ford brings seven years of collegiate experience, including stops at Grand Canyon and Missouri

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers blitz Huskies in final spring match
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The Wisconsin volleyball team swept Northern Illinois (25-18, 25-18, 25-13) in its lone home match of the spring, cruising to a 3-0 victory behind a quality team effort at the UW Field House on Friday night.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Riddle to join Badgers next season
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin men's basketball program announced on Thursday that Isaac Riddle will join the program next fall.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Wisconsin ranks No. 12 in latest Learfield Directors' Cup standings
item.description: Following the winter sports season, Wisconsin ranks No. 12 in the latest Division I Learfield Directors' Cup standings, presented by the National Association of Collegiate Directors of Athletics (NACDA) and LEARFIELD.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers add Manchester to 2026-27 class
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin men's basketball team announced that Josh Manchester will join the program as a freshman for the 2026-27 campaign.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers add SoCon Player of the Year Caia Elisaldez to 2026–27 roster
item.description: High-scoring transfer guard arrives from Chattanooga

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers return home to wrap up spring play
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - The Wisconsin volleyball team is set to return to the UW Field House for the first time this spring to take on Northern Illinois on Friday, April 24, at 6:00 p.m. CT to complete its 2026 spring schedule.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Adds Bardaro to Roster
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team has added libero Anna Bardaro from Cittadella, Italy, announced by head coach Kelly Sheffield.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Foxwell to join Badgers
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — Wisconsin men's basketball has signed Owen Foxwell to its incoming class of 2026, head coach Greg Gard announced Wednesday

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Eian Elmer to join Wisconsin roster
item.description: Wing arrives in Madison after three years at Miami (Ohio)

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Badgers dominate Phoenix in spring exhibition
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. — The Wisconsin volleyball team tamed the Green Bay Phoenix with a 3-0 set victory (25-13, 25-9, 25-12) at the Kress Center on Saturday afternoon.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers add Onuetu to roster
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin men's basketball team announced that forward Victory Onuetu will join the Badgers next season.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball signs Manecke
item.description: MADISON, Wis. - Head coach Kelly Sheffield of the Wisconsin volleyball team has announced the signing of middle blocker Jane Manecke, a 6-foot-2 athlete out of Nazareth Academy in Illinois.

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Autry to join Badgers next season
item.description: MADISON, Wis. — Senior Trey Autry has signed with the Wisconsin men's basketball program, the program announced on Friday.

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Inaugural Big Ten Tournament Set for 2026
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Big Ten Conference and Wisconsin volleyball announce the establishment of a Big Ten Volleyball Tournament beginning this 2026 season. The tournament will be held at the Fishers Event Center in Fishers, Indiana.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: UW Athletic Board approves coaches contracts
item.description: The UW Athletic Board met Wednesday afternoon and approved the following recommendations of the UW Department of Athletics regarding contracts for various sports head coaches.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Belgian guard Alicia Courthiau joins Wisconsin
item.description: Freshman brings EuroCup and national team experience to the Badgers

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers sign NEC Player of the Year Kadidia Toure
item.description: One of the nation's most productive forwards brings veteran leadership to Madison

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers secure five-star guard Addie Deal
item.description: Five-star recruit and All-Big Ten Freshman Team selection joins Badgers from Iowa

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Wisconsin adds in-state standout Teagan Mallegni
item.description: Transfer guard and top in-state recruit heads home to Wisconsin after two years at Iowa

item.title: UW News • Volleyball: Volleyball Match Times Announced for AVCA First Serve
item.description: MADISON, Wis. – The Wisconsin volleyball team will kick-off the 2026 campaign in prime time at the AVCA First Serve at Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee, Wis., opening the season against Kentucky and Louisville in August. The AVCA has also announced that single-session ticket sales will open on April 17.

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: UW Health to become official jersey patch sponsor for Wisconsin women’s sports
item.description: Landmark partnership to be featured on basketball, volleyball, hockey and softball uniforms

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Badgers' season comes to an end in WBIT semifinal
item.description: No. 3 Seed Wisconsin Falls to No. 4 Columbia, 67–50

item.title: UW News • Women's Basketball: Starting Five: Wisconsin ready for WBIT semifinal showdown
item.description: Badgers face Columbia in Kansas

item.title: UW News • Football: Badgers add Ewing to staff as Director of Football Alumni Relations
item.description: Former Badger returns to foster alumni connections

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Football - 2026 Spring Practice
item.description: Preparations for the 2026 season are underway

item.title: UW News • Men's Basketball: Badgers fall to High Point
item.description: The fifth-seeded Wisconsin men's basketball team fell to 12-seed High Point, 83-82, in the first round of the 2026 NCAA Tournament on Thursday at the Moda Center in Portland.

item.title: UW News • Football: Wisconsin Football : 2026 Pro Day media availability
item.description: Wisconsin's NFL Draft prospects met with the media after Pro Day drills on Friday

item.title: UW News • Football: Badgers announce staff additions
item.description: Confesor named wide recievers coach, Ligashesky added as special teams coordinator, among other changes

item.title: UW News • Football: Homecoming game set for Oct. 3
item.description: Events to begin week of Sept. 28

item.title: UW News • Football: Badgers send two to NFL Combine
item.description: Mason Reiger and Vinny Anthony II head to Indy as draft prep continues

item.title: UW News • Football: Mason Reiger NFL Combine Media Interview
item.description: Mason Reiger met with the media at the 2026 NFL Combine

item.title: Brewers News: Solve today's Brewers trivia puzzle
Brewers News: Brewers' Top 30 Prospects list
item.description: Who do the Brewers have in the pipeline? Get scouting reports, video, stats, projected ETAs and more for Milwaukee's Top 30 Prospects.
